overall.description: Static cinematic shot of a grand medieval dining hall from a video game, featuring floating candle chandeliers, long dining tables populated by students, and gothic stone architecture. A single character walks across the foreground in the opening moments before the scene remains still.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand dining hall with floating candles and house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing the dining hall from near the entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking from left to right across the foreground during the first ten seconds

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone column with carved capital in the left foreground
hundreds of floating candles suspended by magic forming a chandelier-like canopy over the hall
tall gothic arched window with blue stained glass at the far end of the hall
long wooden house table set with plates and food running down the center of the hall
decorative hanging banners on the right wall depicting house emblems

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a magnificent gothic dining hall illuminated by thousands of floating candles. Students are seated at long house tables eating and conversing, while a single student walks across the foreground early in the clip. The scene features prominent stone pillars, stained glass windows, and decorative wall tapestries.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall that maintains a steady, atmospheric focus on its bustling interior. It begins with a wide perspective of the magnificent space, where thousands of floating candles cast a warm glow over students seated at long house tables. As a single student walks across the foreground, the camera remains fixed, allowing the movement to emphasize the scale of the surrounding stone pillars and decorative wall tapestries. The scene then settles into a still observation of the environment, highlighting the intricate stained glass windows and the constant hum of conversation among the diners.
